name: socratic-business-model-canvas
author: zhuqingsonga
description: Socratic Business Model Canvas - Guide product managers, founders, and executives to systematically explore and build a complete Business Model Canvas through Socratic deep questioning. 苏格拉底式商业模式画布 - 用苏格拉底式深度追问的方式，引导产品经理、创业者和企业高管系统地探索和构建完整的商业模式画布。
